notes: Solid, complete Pong implementation with proper physics, AI, audio, and game states; minor issue is AI paddle is on the right but labeled as opponent with no two-player mode, and serve direction logic sends ball toward conceder which is slightly unconventional but functional.
An exceptionally well-crafted Pong clone with flawless core logic, solid AI, authentic Web Audio API sound effects, and smooth gameplay.

A solid and mostly complete Pong clone with correct core loop and presentation, but it lacks two-player support and has some minor gameplay/input design limitations that keep it short of benchmark-perfect.
